subcodes.first_line: O Thou Who hast revealed Thyself from the unseen realm of contingency upon all existence, and hast shone forth with the lights of beauty upon the horizons of possibility [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تجلی من غیب الامکان علی الاکوان و اشرق بانوار الجمال علی آفاق الامکان
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @education of children; moral education, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @human reality created in the image of God, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
